geo.headline: Salvya in jouw regio bekijken?
geo.pricingMorocco: Marokko-prijzen in MAD. Wijzig land voor internationale tarieven.
geo.pricingInternational: Internationale catalogusprijzen. Kies Marokko voor lokale MAD-prijzen.
geo.currencyHint: Wijzigt alleen het valutasymbool. Prijzen volgen je land, tenzij je Marokko kiest.
geo.detectedUnknown: Locatie niet beschikbaar — kies je land hieronder.
geo.chargeNote: Afrekenen gebeurt in EUR. Getoonde prijzen volgen je geselecteerde regio.
geo.moroccoStorefrontHint: Marokko-winkel · Prijzen in Marokkaanse dirham (MAD) · Levering beschikbaar in Marokko
geo.mismatchToast: Je verbinding suggereert {detected}. Prijzen blijven op {selected}.

menu.guestSubtitle: Log in voor bestellingen, favorieten en sneller afrekenen.
menu.guestDiscoverSubtitle: Ontdek limited drops, volg creators en shop premium merch — alles op één plek.
menu.reportProblemHint: Help ons de app te verbeteren
menu.helpPoliciesSubtitle: Tik een sectie open voor verzending, retouren, voorwaarden en support.
menu.reportProblemCardHint: Help ons je ervaring te verbeteren
menu.aboutBody: Fashion-tech voor creators — limited drops, premium merch en een community die cultuur verplaatst.

bag.title: Je tas
bag.introGuest: Items die je van productpagina's toevoegt. Log in om je tas op je Salvya-account te bewaren en op elk apparaat te gebruiken.
bag.introSignedIn: Items van productpagina's — opgeslagen op dit apparaat. Schakel cloudsynchronisatie in om je tas overal te houden.
bag.introSynced: Items van productpagina's — opgeslagen op je Salvya-account en dit apparaat. Reken af wanneer je klaar bent; niets wordt gereserveerd tot je bestelt.
bag.emptyHint: Kies bij elk item maat en kleur, tik op {addVariant} en voeg nog een variant toe vóór afrekenen.
bag.footerStatus: {badge} · {variants, plural, one {# variant} other {# varianten}} · {pieces, plural, one {# stuk} other {# stuks}}
bag.multiCheckoutNote: Eén checkout doorloopt elke variant op volgorde.
bag.checkoutCta: Afrekenen · {count, plural, one {# variant} other {# varianten}}
bag.checkoutSecureNote: Veilig Salvya-afrekenen voor alles in je tas.

trackOrder.title: Volg je zending
trackOrder.description: Zoek je Salvya-bestelling met bestelnummer en het e-mailadres bij afrekenen.
trackOrder.notFound: Geen bestelling gevonden met deze gegevens. Controleer nummer en e-mail en probeer opnieuw.
trackOrder.signInPrompt: Ingelogd? Bekijk alle bestellingen in je account.
trackOrder.descriptionLong: Look up real Salvya orders with your SVY number and checkout email. Status reflects our warehouse — carrier scans appear when partners are connected.
trackOrder.helpInbox: Can't find your number? Check your confirmation email or {signIn} to see all orders.

errors.email: Enter the email address used at checkout.

auth.signInDescription: Log in op je Salvya-account om bestellingen en opgeslagen gegevens te beheren.
auth.createAccountDescription: Maak een Salvya-account om gegevens op te slaan, bestellingen te volgen en sneller te shoppen.
auth.signInCardSubtitle: Log in met Google of e-mail. Je tas en likes synchroniseren.
auth.createAccountCardSubtitle: Snelst met Google of maak een wachtwoord. Eén profiel voor checkout.
auth.rememberMeHint: Blijf ingelogd op dit apparaat tot je uitlogt.
auth.clientStartFailed: Kon inloggen niet starten. Vernieuw de pagina.
auth.confirmEmailPrompt: Confirm your email to sign in.
auth.accountDeactivated: This account has been deactivated. Contact support if you need help.
auth.emailLinkIncomplete: Email link was incomplete. Request a new sign-in or confirmation email.
auth.accountReadyBanner: Your account is ready. Check your inbox for a confirmation email if required, then sign in below.
auth.resendCheckInbox: Check your inbox — we sent another confirmation link.
auth.creatorsFooter: Creators — use the same login. Your creator workspace unlocks after approval.
auth.registerBenefit: Faster checkout on this device — bag, orders, and saved addresses.
auth.countryHint: Used for shipping estimates and regional pricing.
auth.termsAccept: I accept the Terms of Service and Account creation addendum
auth.existingEmailTitle: This email already has an account
auth.passwordMismatchForm: Passwords do not match. Check both fields and try again.
auth.passwordMinForm: Use at least 8 characters for your password.
auth.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms of Service and Account addendum to create your account.
auth.countryRequired: Choose your country or region so we can show the right shipping options.
auth.forgotHeroTitle: Get back into your Salvya account.
auth.resetEmailBody: If an account exists for this email, we sent a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSteps: Open the email · tap Reset password · choose a new password
auth.updateIntro: Choose a strong password you have not used on Salvya before.
auth.supabaseServerNotConfigured: Sign-in is not configured on the server. Add keys to salvya.local.env or .env.local.
auth.supabaseEnvHint: Sign-in is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to salvya.local.env (see .env.example), restart dev, then try again.
auth.loginHeroTitle: One sign-in for your bag, orders, and artist shops.
auth.loginHeroBody: One account for every device. Sign in to sync your bag, likes, follows, notifications, and orders placed while logged in. Checkout contact fields still use your browser session until saved addresses ship.
auth.loginBullet1: Bag, likes, alerts, and order history on your profile when cloud sync is enabled.
auth.loginBullet2: Secure access with email and password — recovery steps live in Help & terms.
auth.loginBullet3: Selling as a creator? Use this account, then open creator tools from the menu.
auth.loginMobileIntro: Sign in for the member shell, synced bag & likes, and artist shops. Checkout contact details stay in your browser session until saved addresses ship.
auth.existingEmailBanner: An account already exists for {email}. Sign in below — do not create another account with the same email.
auth.forgotHeroBody: We send a secure, single-use link to your inbox. Open it on this device to choose a new password — the link expires after a short time for your safety.
auth.forgotBullet1: Check spam or promotions if nothing arrives within a few minutes.
auth.forgotBullet2: Use the newest email if you requested more than one reset.
auth.forgotBullet3: Still stuck? Visit Help or create an account if you are new to Salvya.
auth.forgotMobileIntro: Enter your account email. We will send a link to set a new password.
auth.resetSentShort: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.
auth.resetPrivacyNote: Use the same email you sign in with. We never tell outsiders whether an address is registered.
auth.resetSentTo: We sent instructions to {email}. Open the link to choose a new password.
auth.resetStepOpenEmail: Open the email from Salvya (check spam).
auth.resetStepTapReset: Tap Reset password in the message.
auth.resetStepPickPassword: Pick a new password on the Salvya page that opens.
auth.sendAgain: Did not get it? Send again
auth.forgotEmailRequired: Enter the email address you use to sign in to Salvya.
auth.authConnectFailed: Could not connect to authentication. Check your environment variables.
auth.resetLinkBuildFailed: Could not build a secure reset link. Reload this page and try again.
auth.updateHeroBody: You arrived here from a secure reset link. After saving, sign in on any device with your new password. Your bag, likes, and orders stay on your account.
auth.updateBullet1: Use a password you do not reuse on other sites.
auth.updateBullet2: Mix letters, numbers, and a symbol for the best protection.
auth.updateBullet3: Sign out of shared devices after updating.
auth.updateMobileIntro: Set a new password for your Salvya account.
auth.linkExpiredBody: Reset links are single-use and expire. Open the newest email from Salvya, or send yourself a new link.
auth.linkExpiredPageBody: This page needs a valid reset link from your email. Older links stop working after you use them or when they expire.
auth.passwordUpdatedBody: Your password is saved. You can continue shopping or sign in again on another device.
auth.signedInNewPassword: You are signed in with your new password on this device.
auth.passwordStrongerRequired: Use a stronger password — include upper and lower case letters and a number.
auth.registerHeroBody: One profile for checkout, your bag, and order history. Morocco and international shipping — save your country once.
auth.registerBullet1: Faster checkout with saved contact and addresses when signed in.
auth.registerBullet2: Track orders with your SVY number and email on any device.
auth.registerBullet3: Optional culture emails — limited drops and restocks only.

checkout.paypalVerifyNote: We bevestigen bedrag en capture bij PayPal voordat de bestelling als betaald wordt gemarkeerd. Meestal duurt dit enkele seconden.
checkout.codNote: Rembours — betaal de koerier bij levering.
checkout.paidNote: PayPal-betaling geverifieerd. We mailen je wanneer we verzenden.
checkout.soldOutClosed: This item is sold out — checkout is closed for now.
checkout.introShipping: Tell us where to send your {kind}. Morocco: cash on delivery or PayPal. International: PayPal only.
checkout.cardsViaPayPal: Cards are processed securely through PayPal.
checkout.internationalNote: International order — cash on delivery is not available outside Morocco.
checkout.moroccoPaymentNote: Morocco — delivery and payment at the next step (cash on delivery or PayPal).
checkout.savedAddressHint: Ship to an address from your Salvya account.
checkout.manualAddressHint: Type a one-off address for this order only.
checkout.noSavedAddresses: No saved addresses yet. Add one in Account settings, or enter a new address below.
checkout.contactSubtitle: We use this to confirm your order and send updates.
checkout.deliverySubtitle: Country defines available payment methods and delivery options.
checkout.streetPlaceholderMa: Quarter, street, building, floor — as precise as possible
checkout.editAddressHint: Need to edit this address? Switch to « New address for this order ».
checkout.previewNoCharge: Preview checkout — no charge yet until you confirm on the last step.
checkout.deliveryHintMorocco: Morocco · typical delivery 2–5 business days after confirmation.
checkout.deliveryHintIntl: International · express tracked shipping — timelines shown at payment.
checkout.paymentIntroMorocco: Morocco: choose cash on delivery or pay with PayPal (card via PayPal).
checkout.paymentIntroIntl: Your address is outside Morocco — PayPal only (card or PayPal balance).
checkout.cardsNotStored: Card details are processed by PayPal — Salvya never stores your card.
checkout.intlShippingNote: International shipping — COD only available in Morocco.
checkout.payCardDesc: Visa, Mastercard, Amex via PayPal — no PayPal account required.
checkout.payCodDesc: Betaal in MAD bij de koerier.
checkout.completePayPalFirst: Complete PayPal payment above to continue.
checkout.completePayPalHint: Use the PayPal button above — we will unlock the next step when payment is received.
checkout.paymentCancelled: Payment cancelled — tap PayPal when you are ready.
checkout.paypalReceived: PayPal payment received — you can continue to confirmation.
checkout.soldOutPayment: This item is sold out — payment and confirmation are unavailable.
checkout.paymentVerifyFailed: Payment could not be verified. Try again or choose another method.
checkout.confirmFailed: We could not confirm your order. Contact support if you were charged.
checkout.thankYouEmail: Thank you for ordering from {artist}. We will email you at {email} when your order ships.
checkout.bagEmptyError: Your bag is empty or could not be loaded.

errors.addressPath: Choose a saved address or enter a new one.
errors.storage: Could not load saved addresses. Try again or enter a new address.

account.noOrders: Nog geen bestellingen op dit account.
account.noOrdersGuest: Log in om bestellingen aan je account te zien.
account.notificationsEmptyBody: Tas-updates, favorieten, follows en bestellingen verschijnen hier automatisch.
account.hubIntro: Hub for orders, alerts, addresses, and your bag — everything in one place.
account.signInToSync: Sign in to sync orders, addresses, and notifications across devices.
account.saveFailed: Could not save your details. Try again.
account.addressDeleteConfirm: Remove this address from your account?
account.ordersGuestHint: Orders placed while signed in sync here. Guest checkouts — use your SVY number and email on track order.
account.addressesHint: Save shipping destinations once — pick them at checkout when signed in.
account.alertsHint: Orders, drops, and account messages when signed in.
account.emptyActiveDesc: When you checkout while signed in, live orders show here with tracking and your invoice.
account.emptyHistoryDesc: Completed and cancelled orders will appear here.
account.settingsPageIntro: Profile, shipping book, preferences, and security — tuned for Salvya checkout and culture drops.
account.personalDetailsDesc: Name, contact, and profile info — saved to your Salvya account and used at checkout.
account.addressesDesc: Save multiple destinations and choose one at checkout. Only one default applies — we reset the others automatically.
account.preferencesDesc: Language and communications — tuned for how you browse and hear from Salvya.
account.securityDesc: Protect your Salvya identity and sessions.
account.signOutEverywhereHint: Sign out everywhere will arrive with device/session management.
account.dangerZoneDesc: You can temporarily deactivate sign-in or permanently erase your Salvya account and linked personal data. Order records may be retained in anonymised form where the law requires it.
account.dangerZoneSectionDesc: Deactivate or permanently delete your account. We do not keep a restorable personal backup after you proceed.

shop.title: Officiële artist merch
shop.description: Bekijk beperkte hoodies, tees en drops van artiesten op Salvya.

artist.officialShop: Officiële Salvya-shop — dezelfde veilige checkout als de rest van het platform.

seo.defaultDescription: Officiële artist merch op Salvya: limited runs, premium streetwear, Europese verzending en mobiele checkout voor fans.

errors.generic: Er ging iets mis. Probeer het opnieuw.
errors.network: Controleer je verbinding en probeer opnieuw.
errors.unauthorized: Log in om door te gaan.

orders.title: Mijn bestellingen
orders.subtitle: Invoice, tracking, and cancellation — tied to your Salvya account.
orders.cancelWindowClosed: The 24-hour cancellation window has passed for this order.
orders.loadFailed: Could not load this order. Try again.
orders.emptyActiveDesc: When you checkout while signed in, live orders show here with tracking and your invoice.
orders.emptyHistoryDesc: Completed and cancelled orders will appear here.
